name_en: P🆕【Premium Original】🔥【Exclusive Background】💋LouLou Small, Spring/Summer 2026 New. Soft lambskin with a glossy finish. Includes a detachable card holder and full-label vanity mirror. Features a sliding chain, suitable for shoulder or crossbody use. The new lambskin has a coating for added durability and a premium shine, making the bag look exquisite.🖤
